[2018-04-20 19:29] liadahlia (Lia): problem with savior is that it's a very polarizing unit
[2018-04-20 19:29] liadahlia (Lia): you either win really hard or lose really hard
[2018-04-20 19:30] crash_overlord: There ARE sets where it's very close
[2018-04-20 19:30] crash_overlord: It's just that once you stabilize you "seem" to win really hard
[2018-04-20 19:30] crash_overlord: but 1-2 more damage could've meant you lose
[2018-04-20 19:32] liadahlia (Lia): are you talking about 1-2 more damage before you stabilize?
[2018-04-20 19:34] crash_overlord: I'm just saying that while it seems like it super hardcore losses or super hardcore wins
[2018-04-20 19:34] crash_overlord: It's usually actually very close
[2018-04-20 19:35] crash_overlord: It's just the endgame often doesn't come down to like breachproof type scenarios.
[2018-04-20 19:35] crash_overlord: Where it's 3 gauss vs 2 gauss cannons or whatever

[2018-04-20 19:35] crash_overlord: I mean usually when it's asymetric
[2018-04-20 19:35] crash_overlord: Rarely do you see someone buy savior and die immediately with absolutely chance
[2018-04-20 19:35] crash_overlord: and rarely do you see someone not go savior and do nothing vs the saviour player
[2018-04-20 19:36] crash_overlord: atleast in my experience
[2018-04-20 19:36] mrguy888: asymetric savior is extremely rare. I'd be surprised if anyone has enough experience to say what is usual in those games.
